title: N-Type Bifacial With Double Glass DM610
datasheet: /data/solarPV/1. N-Type Bifacial with Double Glass DM610-625M10T-B78HSW_HBW.pdf
features: Bifacial Module Application: Up to 25 % higher electricity yields due to active cell technology in bifacial glass/glass modules on both sides.
Better Performance: Our modules perform better on sunny and hot days thanks to its optimized temperature coefficient.
Excellent Quality: More than 40 years’ experience of manufacturing and intensive quality tests above the IEC standard ensures reliable modules and a secured investment.
Assumption of Environmental, Social and Governance Responsibility (ESG): DMEGC stands for his responsibility. Production is certified according to SA 8000 (ILO standards).

title: Bifacial with Dual Glass DM535-550M10-B72HSW
features: Bifacial Module Application: High power generation on the back side.
Excellent Loading Capacity: Certified to withstand high wind loads (2400 Pa) and snow loads (5400 Pa).
High PID Resistance: Double glass design minimizes degradation from potential induced degradation.
Quality Assurance: Rigorous tests that exceed general standards.

title: Mono-Facial DM540-555M10-72HSW
features: High Power Output: Leverages high-efficiency mono PERC technology.
Durability: Passed severe environment test (salt mist, ammonia corrosion, sand blowing).
Low light performance: Enhanced energy generation under cloudy conditions.

title: Hyper NOVA N 590 +W
features: N-Type TOPCon Technology: High efficiency with lower degradation.
Double Glass Structure: Exceptional moisture protection.
Optimized Design: Maximizes energy yields in utility scales.

title: Quasar 670 W
features: Ultra High Power: Based on 210mm large wafer technology.
Low BOS Cost: Reduces wiring and structure footprint.
High reliability: Built for industrial-scale arrays.

title: Quasar-bi 685+w
features: Bifacial Energy Yields: Extra generation from albedo reflection.
210mm Cell Tech: Unmatched electrical characteristics.
Lower Levelized Cost of Energy (LCOE).

title: Hyper Nova n 640+w
features: Advanced TOPCon cells: Superior power-to-area ratio.
Low-light performance optimized.
Anti-LID and Anti-PID characteristics.

title: Hitachi Residential Inverters
features: Smart Ongrid Inverter with RMS inbuilt.
Compact design for easy residential mounting.
High efficiency performance with wide MPPT range.

title: Commercial & Industrial (C&I) Inverters
features: Suitable for high-capacity commercial rooftops.
Multiple MPPT trackers to optimize generation from multiple directions.
Inbuilt DC switch and surge protection options.

title: Central Inverters
features: Utility scale configuration with high efficiency transformer coupling.
Outdoor structure IP65 rating.
Advanced grid support functionalities.

title: Rooftop PV Weather Stations
features: Compact and easy-to-install sensors for rooftop weather monitoring.
Measures Irradiance, Module Temperature, Ambient Temperature, Wind Speed.
Modbus RTU output for seamless SCADA integration.

title: Utility Scale PV Weather Stations
features: Class-A Pyranometer for high precision solar radiation measurement.
Includes Ultrasonic Wind sensor, Rain gauge, Barometric pressure, Humidity sensors.
Fully compliant with IEC 61724-1 requirements.

title: Smart WMS Data Logger
features: Stores local weather data and uploads to cloud/SCADA.
Supports analog, digital, and Modbus RTU sensors.
Batteries backup for non-interrupted data recording.

title: Low Voltage Hybrid Inverters
features: 48V battery compatibility for safe residential storage.
Saves excess solar power to run during power outages.
Seamless switching to backup power in <10ms.

title: High Voltage Hybrid Inverters
features: High voltage battery compatibility (150V - 800V) for higher efficiency.
Peak shaving and load shifting features for commercial buildings.
Supports parallel operation for scaling storage capacity.
